parameters.query: SELECT json_build_object( 'table_exists', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='clearnetwork' AND table_name='mrf_research'), 'coverage', (SELECT row_to_json(c) FROM (SELECT count(*) AS total_entries, count(DISTINCT insurer_name) AS unique_insurers, count(DISTINCT state) AS states, count(*) FILTER (WHERE accessibility='automatable') AS automatable, count(*) FILTER (WHERE accessibility='browser_required') AS browser_required, count(*) FILTER (WHERE accessibility='dead') AS dead, count(*) FILTER (WHERE accessibility='auth_required') AS auth_blocked, round(avg(transparency_score) FILTER (WHERE transparency_score IS NOT NULL)) AS avg_transparency, round(avg(digital_debt_score) FILTER (WHERE digital_debt_score IS NOT NULL)) AS avg_debt, count(*) FILTER (WHERE crawl_tested AND crawl_result='success') AS successfully_crawled FROM clearnetwork.mrf_research) c), 'worst', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(w ORDER BY w.digital_debt_score DESC) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (insurer_name) insurer_name, state, digital_debt_score, accessibility, substring(notes for 80) AS notes FROM clearnetwork.mrf_research WHERE digital_debt_score IS NOT NULL AND digital_debt_score > 0 ORDER BY insurer_name, digital_debt_score DESC) w), '[]'::json), 'best', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(b ORDER BY b.transparency_score DESC) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (insurer_name) insurer_name, state, transparency_score, index_type, accessibility FROM clearnetwork.mrf_research WHERE transparency_score IS NOT NULL AND transparency_score > 0 ORDER BY insurer_name, transparency_score DESC) b), '[]'::json), 'failures', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(f) FROM (SELECT cf.url, cf.error_message, i.legal_name AS insurer_name FROM clearnetwork.crawl_failures cf JOIN clearnetwork.crawl_jobs cj ON cf.crawl_job_id=cj.id JOIN clearnetwork.insurers i ON cj.insurer_id=i.id WHERE cf.last_attempt > NOW()-INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY cf.last_attempt DESC LIMIT 10) f), '[]'::json), 'dark_states', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(ds.state) FROM (SELECT state FROM clearnetwork.mrf_research GROUP BY state HAVING count(*) FILTER (WHERE accessibility='automatable')=0) ds), '[]'::json) ) AS data

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 4096, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO clearnetwork.blog_posts (published_at, title, slug, summary, content_html, content_markdown, tags, stats) VALUES (NOW(), '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.slug }}', '{{ $json.summary.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', $1, $2, ARRAY['transparency','crawl-report','digital-debt','healthcare'], '{{ $json.stats }}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (slug) DO UPDATE SET title=EXCLUDED.title, summary=EXCLUDED.summary, content_html=EXCLUDED.content_html, content_markdown=EXCLUDED.content_markdown, stats=EXCLUDED.stats, published_at=NOW() RETURNING id, slug
